The '''''Shrike''''' was a modified [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] [[Alpha-52 starfighter]] prototype owned by [[Talon Karrde]] that was never developed for the open market.

==History==
Karrde permanently loaned it to [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] for her use around the time of [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] it was impounded while in [[Katraasii Spaceport]], but was soon retrieved by [[Ka'Pa]] the Hutt after Jade was captured by the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Takara]].
She continued to use the vessel during her search for her [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kyle Katarn]] on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]].

{{Ship-stub}}
